name: Raichles Transport Svc
recent_news: No public news, M&A activity, or web presence identified as of 2026 search.
fit_notes: Micro-operator (4 employees, ~$332K revenue) in rural Townsend, DE with no discoverable web footprint. Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in; would only matter if it holds a niche SPED contract with a NCC/Kent district.

name: Supreme Limousine Inc
recent_news: No public news or M&A activity identified. Name and PO Box address suggest a limo/livery operator rather than a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Likely a livery/limo company rather than a yellow-bus or true SPED contractor; 4 employees and PO Box-only address. Not a viable Summit tuck-in absent confirmation of contracted school routes.

name: R & S Transportation
recent_news: No public news identified. An R&S Transportation LLC USDOT carrier exists; the well-known R&S Transport (rstransportinc.com) is a Southeastern Minnesota special-needs provider, not this MT entity.
fit_notes: Tiny Billings, MT operator (~4 employees, ~$330K) outside Summit's core geography with no school-district contract evidence. Not a priority tuck-in.

name: Magic Limousine Svc
recent_news: Listed on Yelp as Magic Limousine Service at 1518 Mill Rd, Grand Forks. A related entity 'Classic Magic Limousine, Inc.' is registered in ND at 5700 Gateway Dr. No school-bus contract evidence.
fit_notes: Appears to be a limousine/livery service, not a yellow-bus or SPED contractor. Outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in profile.

name: Mainline Limousine Inc
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER lists a 'Mainline Transportation Inc' (USDOT 1255473) but no clear school-transport activity tied to Mainline Limousine in Pleasant Prairie. Lamers Bus Lines is the regional school-bus presence, not Mainline.
fit_notes: Name and size (~7 employees, $320K revenue) strongly suggest limo/livery rather than school-bus contractor. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target absent evidence of district contracts.
